items.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates: GIFT Nifty hints at flat start amid mixed cues; Nikkei 225 hits 58k
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty was trading at 25,998 levels, up by 25.50 points, indicating a flat start for benchmark indices

items.title: Stocks to Watch today: Lenskart, Patanjali Foods, Hindalco, SJVN, Vedanta
items.description: Stocks to watch today, Thursday, February 12, 2026: Market participants will keep an eye on Lenskart Solutions, Patanjali Foods, Hindalco Industries, and SJVN shares.

items.title: DPIIT notifies 100% FDI in insurance companies under automatic route
items.description: In an Indian insurance company having foreign investment, at least one among the chairperson of its board, its managing director and its chief executive officer, shall be resident Indian citizens

items.title: AIIL a bounce play; Coforge, Jubilant Food in downtrend, show tech charts
items.description: Technical stock picks by Drumil Vithlani of Bonanza: AIIL shows rebound potential near key support with 5 per cent upside target, while Coforge and Jubilant Foodworks remain in strong downtrends

items.title: Nifty outlook: Index to consolidate; Ajit Mishra suggests 3 stocks to buy
items.description: Nifty outlook for Feb 12: Index consolidates near 25,950 amid mixed sectoral trends. Ajit Mishra recommends Glenmark Pharma, Nippon Life and TVS Motor as stocks to buy today.

items.title: Ashok Leyland up 3%, hovers near 52-week high post Q3; analysts weigh
items.description: In the December quarter, Ashok Leyland posted a 5 per cent increase in consolidated net profit to ₹862 crore, compared to ₹820 crore during the corresponding period last year

items.title: TBO Tek shares drop 6% despite in-line Q3 results; profit up 7% YoY
items.description: TBO Tek reported a 7.4 per cent Y-o-Y rise in net profit at ₹53.6 crore for the quarter, compared with ₹49.9 crore in the corresponding period last year

items.title: Brokerages remain cautiously optimistic on M&M post Q3; stock down 2%
items.description: The selling pressure on the counter came after brokerages remained cautiously optimistic on M&M post its Q3FY26 numbers released on Tuesday, during market hours

items.title: Lenskart Solutions hit all-time high on posting Q3; brokerages hike TP
items.description: In the December quarter, Lenskart Solutions posted a multi-fold jump in year-on-year (Y-o-Y) rise in net profit for Q3FY26 to ₹131 crore, compared to ₹1.85 crore in Q3FY25

items.title: LG Electronics sees worst intraday fall post listing, slides 8% post Q3
items.description: LG Electronics reported a weak set of results, weighed down by subdued performance in the home appliances segment amid post-Diwali demand softness, analysts at Motilal Oswal said

items.title: HUL slips 4% in trade post Q3 results; here's why stock is under pressure
items.description: In the December quarter, HUL posted a 30 per cent decline in consolidated net profit (from continuing business) to ₹2,118 crore, compared to ₹3,027 crore year-on-year (Y-o-Y)

items.title: Antique initiates with 'Buy' on Artemis Medicare; sees 45% stock upside
items.description: Antique initiated coverage on Artemis Medicare with a 'Buy' rating and a target price of ₹340, a potential upside of 45 per cent from Wednesday's close

items.title: Britannia share price rises post Q3; Nomura, MOFSL, Emkay see more upside
items.description: Britannia Industries shares rise after Q3FY26 earnings beat with strong margin expansion. Nomura raises target to ₹7,275; MOFSL, JM Financial, ICICI Securities remain bullish on stock

items.title: Jupiter Wagons shares drop 4% after Q3 profit plunges 35% YoY
items.description: Jupiter Wagons reported a 35.29 per cent decline in net profit at ₹62.99 crore for the quarter ended December 2025, compared with ₹97.34 crore in the year-ago period

items.title: Trade deals, capex push boost India's aero, defence outlook: Goldman Sachs
items.description: Goldman Sachs highlighted three major tailwinds for the sector, including an 18 per cent Y-o-Y increase in capital procurement in the Union defence budget for FY27, and the proposed India-EU FTA

items.title: Tech Mahindra, Infy among top analyst picks as IT stocks continue to slide
items.description: Analysts at Geojit Investments and Choice Broking are bullish on Tech Mahindra stock, and view the current fall as a correction rather than trend reversal.

items.title: Nifty IT index tumbles over 4%; TCS, Wipro, Cyient, Hexaware hit 52-wk lows
items.description: TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Coforge, Tech Mahindra, Persistent Systems, HCL Technologies, LTIMindtree and Mphasis were down in the range of 4 per cent to 5 per cent in intra-day trade on Thursday.

items.title: Divi's Labs shares fall 3% on Q3 earnings miss; brokerages split on outlook
items.description: Divi's Laboratories reported a consolidated profit after tax (PAT) of ₹583 crore, marginally lower than ₹589 crore in the same period last year

items.title: SJVN share price rises 5% to over 1-month high following Q3 results
items.description: SJVN share price rose as much as 5.3 per cent to ₹81.50 on National Stock Exchange(NSE) after net profit increased 51 per cent on year

items.title: Kirloskar Oil Engines jumps 8% to over 1-year high on strong Q3 results
items.description: Kirloskar Oil Engines share price touched the highest level since July, 2024 after the company reported  net profit growth and highest ever third-quarter (Q3FY26) sales

items.title: Shrimp stocks: Avanti Feeds, Apex Frozen soar up to 16%; here's why
items.description: Thus far in the month of February, the stock price of Avanti Feeds has zoomed 75 per cent, while Apex Frozen Foods 52 per cent.

items.title: Yatra Online tanks 9% on posting Q3 results; PAT down 17% YoY, Rev up 9%
items.description: In the December quarter, Yatra Online posted a 17 per cent decline in consolidated net profit to ₹8.3 crore, compared to ₹10 crore year-on-year (Y-o-Y)

items.title: Nifty FMCG index tanks 6% in 2026; analysts remain selective on stocks
items.description: As a strategy, Gaurang Shah, head investment strategist at Geojit Investments remains selectively bullish on the FMCG stocks on the back of a likely improvement in semi-urban and rural demand.

items.title: TCS Mcap rout deepens; loses spot to ICICI Bank for first time since 2009
items.description: Reliance Industries currently ranks first with a market capitalisation, followed by HDFC Bank in second place and Bharti Airtel in third

items.title: Netweb Technologies down 4% in trade; 3.43 mn shares change hands on NSE
items.description: According to data compiled by Bloomberg, about 1.38 million shares or 2.4 per cent equity changed hands on NSE. The buyers and sellers of the transactions were not known

items.title: SBI, Eicher, L&T, Shriram Finance hit new peaks; ONGC, NTPC at 52-wk highs
items.description: NTPC and Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) from the Nifty 50 touched their respective 52-week highs.

items.title: Asia shares rise after US jobs data;  Japan, South Korea indices hit record
items.description: South Korea's Kospi breached the 5,500 mark for the first time, driven by gains for technology-related stocks; it was up 3.1 per cent at 5,522.27

items.title: Axis Sec sees up to 18% upside in these 4 stocks; charts show bullish trend
items.description: SBI, Federal Bank, Shriram Finance and Ujjivan SFB are showing strong bullish uptrend, with all 4 stocks trading above the key moving averages across time-frames, suggest technical charts.

items.title: Domestic investors pumped ₹1.14 trn into AIFs in 18 months: Crisil report
items.description: Domestic investors accounted for 55.3% of category I and II AIF capital in September 2025, up from 50.3% in March 2024, with an incremental inflow of ₹1.14 trillion over the period intervening

items.title: Amara Raja Energy falls 5% on Q3 results; profit down 53%, margins contract
items.description: Amara Raja Energy net profit fell 53 per cent year-on-year to ₹140 crore in Q3FY26 from ₹298.4 crore in the year-ago period

items.title: GE Power India zooms 20% on huge volumes; what's driving industrial stock?
items.description: With today's rally, the market price of GE Power India has zoomed 104 per cent from its 52-week low of ₹196 touched on April 7, 2025.

items.title: Technocraft Industries share price jumps 13% to 5-month high post Q3 result
items.description: Technocraft Industries (India) rose as much as 13.29 per cent to ₹2,696.90, the highest level since August 22, 2025, on the National Stock Exchange (NSE)

items.title: Voltas rallies 19% in 9 trading days, hits 52-week high in weak market
items.description: The stock price of Voltas was up 3% to ₹1,545.15, surpassing its previous high of  ₹1,530 touched on March 19, 2025 on the BSE.

items.title: Nifty Oil & Gas falls 1% as oil prices rise; IGL, MGL, BPCL shares drag
items.description: The Nifty Oil and Gas declined as much as 1.24 per cent to the day's low of 12,199.20. Out of 15 constituents of the index, 13 stocks declined amid rising crude oil prices

items.title: Sebi to review NSDL root-cause report on tech glitch: Tuhin Kanta Pandey
items.description: Regulator will examine NSDL's root cause analysis of the recent technical glitch that disrupted inter-depository settlements, Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey said

items.title: Sebi mulls measures to cut regulatory costs, study market impact
items.description: Regulator is considering a centre for regulatory studies and an expert panel to assess compliance burden and cost impact across the market ecosystem

items.title: NSE appoints Rothschild & Co as independent adviser for IPO process
items.description: Exchange names Rothschild & Co to lead transparent selection of intermediaries for its IPO, which will be entirely a secondary share sale
